PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner ?year WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q482980 ; wdt:P118 wd:Q11151 ; wdt:P1346 ?winner ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
  ?winner wdt:P5138 ?teamSeason .
  ?teamSeason wdt:P118 ?league .
  FILTER(?league != wd:Q9412 && ?league != wd:Q9434)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
